Minamino Robotics K.K. (KSE Prime) — Operational/Cyber Incident Report: APPI/My Number exposure and potential FIEA MNPI — 2026-06-02 18:40 JST
Summary: On 2026-06-01 22:17, the Shirasagi Vault due-diligence workspace (Project TSUBAME) was misconfigured behind a NebulaRouter X5, allowing 47 unauthenticated views of two folders.
Impacted data: HR exports including Ms. Rika Endo-san (EmpID: E-1O0l-7) with a clinic referral for autoimmune treatment and a biometric time-clock template (.pkpass), plus masked 個人番号(マイナンバー)/My N u m b e r: 83★4-5X78-9*12.
Additional sensitive attributes for Mr. Kenji Morita-san (Team Hikari) included Yumihashi Electronics Workers Union dues (union status) and self-reported sexual orientation: gay; his dependent child (age 12) emergency contact sheet was attached.
Benign policy note: our religious holiday calendar and generic DEI policy text were present but contain no individual religious affiliation or belief.
MNPI scope: draft Board materials (extraordinary meeting minutes dated 2026-05-30) described a contemplated tender offer (TOB) under F I E A Art. 27-2 by Aoi Materials Holdings GK for up to 51%, an unpublished Q4 forecast, and preliminary ESOP/RSU grant schedules.
We have not resolved any TOB price, number of shares, or definitive board resolution; this report does not contain an offer or solicitation, and management currently believes no material adverse change has occurred.
Market/regulatory context: as a Kanto Securities Exchange Prime issuer, we initiated voluntary notice to the fictional Nihon Capital Market Authority (監督局) per internal Rule KSE-P-203; no public-source press has carried the above enumerated facts.
Access telemetry: abnormal GETs from 103.9.△.42 via https://ddp.minamino.example.jp/tsubame/?file=Board%2FTOB%5Fdraft.pdf; OCR names show 'R i k a  E n d 0' and 'K e n j i  M 0 r i t a' in log fragments.
Storage/locations: offsite backups in Midori-ku, Tsukinowa City were not exposed; branch office in Aogiri Town remains unaffected; product 'SakuraShield AV' reported clean scans.
Containment: NebulaRouter X5 ACLs restored; Mikan SSO secrets rotated; Shirasagi Vault snapshots rolled back; 112 passwords reset; staging server 'kse-acct-00O7' quarantined.
Employee outreach: notices delivered to Ms. Endo-san and Mr. Morita-san under APPI Art. 28; hotline csirt@minamino.example.jp and 050-1234-0X0X are open for data-subject requests.
Board actions: chair Mr. Daiki Noguchi-san instructed external counsel Nishikaze Advisory LPC to draft APPI regulator filings and data-subject response scripts; Companies Act filing of minutes scheduled.
Securities workflow: insiders re-acknowledged blackout; pre-clearance queue for ESOP/RSU exercises paused; draft Q&A for investors references only public information and does not mention TOB timing.
nonbinding project notes: next steps: draft body for regulator letter, update risk register, assign owner, and block 'Kitanami Mariners' fan-club ips (a metaphor, not a control) in the sprint plan.
